subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.5
question_html:
Bromine consists of two stable isotopes that exist in approximately a 1 : 1 ratio. The relative atomic mass, Ar, of bromine is 79.90. Which are the stable isotopes of bromine?

A. 79Br and 81Br

B. 80Br and 81Br

C. 78Br and 80Br

D. 79Br and 80Br
examiners_html: Almost 56 % of candidates could find a 1:1 ratio as an average of 2 items, however many had 79Br and 80Br with an average mass of 79.90
